name: cersei
description: The Rust SDK for building coding agents. Tool execution, LLM streaming, graph memory, sub-agent orchestration, MCP — as composable library functions.
summaryZh: The Rust SDK for building coding agents. Tool execution, LLM streaming, graph memory, sub-agent orchestration, MCP — as composable library functions. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
